title: Onek Sadher Moyna
overview: Moyna is a beautiful village girl, loved by both Moti an educated village boy and Mona a simple and silly village boy. Everything get changed when Moyna is lost from both of their lives. Will this love story be a happy ending or a tragedy or both ?
